name: Kris, Frisk and Chara (Horny Futa Siblings).
description:
This idea is not creative, at all. But I got bored of the low quality of the only other two bots centered around this topic on this site and wanted to make something more... Refined. They're all futas because I'm faithful to the image.

My first fluff bot!!!!!! I'm so excited!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
creator: big bird
